case_title: HOLMES JAMES JR VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MALBROUGH PRECIOUS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,018.00 FILED BY HOLMES JAMES JR AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MALBROUGH PRECIOUS MALBROUGH AUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,970.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MALBROUGH PRECIOUS MALBROUGH AUSTIN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HOLMES JAMES JR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES JAMES JR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MALBROUGH PRECIOUS $439.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $447.00, JUDG.REFLECTS A CREDIT OF $361 FOR RENTAL DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLMES JAMES JR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MALBROUGH PRECIOUS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HOLMES JAMES JR $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
